commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human/provider-owner handling is needed because the remaining blocker is live credentialed proof or an explicit proof override, not a mechanical code repair.; Cleared: The diff only changes a TypeScript stream-wrapper guard and tests; it does not add dependencies, workflows, secrets handling, or downloaded code. (sha=3cf1f33718bcc64a29a7ee40a89b43402ec29c68)
commands.review_summary:
The branch widens Google thinking-payload sanitization to `google-vertex` and `google-gemini-cli` API identifiers and adds focused plugin SDK wrapper tests.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +50. Total +54 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run in this review. Source inspection and the linked production report support the root cause, but the PR head was not exercised against real Vertex or Gemini CLI credentials.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human/provider-owner handling is needed because the remaining blocker is live credentialed proof or an explicit proof override, not a mechanical code repair.

target.title: fix: sanitize Google thinking payloads for Vertex
target.body:
## Summary

- Extends the Google thinking payload sanitizer to `google-vertex` and `google-gemini-cli` APIs in addition to `google-generative-ai`.
- Preserves passthrough behavior for non-Google APIs.
- Adds focused SDK stream-wrapper coverage for the new API identifiers.

Refs #38327. This covers the thinking-payload sanitizer path only; any remaining gaxios/native-fetch auth-stack work should stay tracked separately.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/google-stream-wrappers.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/extra-params.google.test.ts extensions/google/provider-models.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream.test.ts`
- `codex review --uncommitted`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Google Vertex and Gemini CLI streaming payloads now receive the same thinking-config sanitization as Google Generative AI payloads.

Real environment tested: WSL-native checkout at `origin/main` `b86435f0b5`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran format, `git diff --check`, focused Google/plugin-sdk Vitest, then `codex review --uncommitted` in `/root/openclaw-wsl-google-38327`.

Evidence after fix: Focused Vitest passed 5 files / 47 tests; Codex review reported no actionable regression.

Observed result after fix: `google-generative-ai`, `google-vertex`, and `google-gemini-cli` payloads convert invalid thinking budget payloads to the expected thinking level; non-Google APIs keep the original payload unchanged.

What was not tested: Full CI was not run locally; this was scoped to the affected Google stream-wrapper and related Google model tests. Live Vertex/Gemini CLI provider proof was not run because credentials were not available in this maintainer worktree.
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
